steps.title: Add 20 mL of isopropanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL of isopropanol to the MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 concentrate.

steps.title: Add 30 mL of isopropanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 30 mL of isopropanol to the MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 concentrate.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.2 mL of Proteinase K Storage Buffer per vial to reconstitute the lyophilized Proteinase K at 20 mg/mL Vortex to dissolve. STORE AT -20 °C Freezer.

steps.title: Pre-make pathogen buffer plate with 880...
steps.instruction: Pre-make pathogen buffer plate with 880 µL Pathogen DNA/RNA buffer in 1ml deep well plate.

steps.title: Pre-make bead plate with 25 µL...
steps.instruction: Pre-make bead plate with 25 µL MagBinding beads into 96V-well PCR plate. *Make immediately before starting, <1h prior to starting the protocol, to ensure the beads are mixed.

steps.title: Pre-make DNA/RNA Wash 1 plate with...
steps.instruction: Pre-make DNA/RNA Wash 1 plate with 550 µL Wash 1 buffer into a 1ml deep well plate.

steps.title: Pre-make DNA/RNA Wash 2 plate with...
steps.instruction: Pre-make DNA/RNA Wash 2 plate with 550 µL Wash 2 buffer into a 1ml deep well plate.

steps.title: Pre-make 100% ethanol plate with 1...
steps.instruction: Pre-make 100% ethanol plate with 1 mL 100% ethanol into a 2ml deep well plate.

steps.title: Pre-make 80% ethanol plate with 600...
steps.instruction: Pre-make 80% ethanol plate with 600 µL 80% ethanol into a 1ml deep well plate.

steps.title: Pre-make water plate with 50 µL...
steps.instruction: Pre-make water plate with 50 µL DNAase/RNAse-free water in a 96 V-well PCR plate.

steps.title: Pre-make water plate with 30 µL...
steps.instruction: Pre-make water plate with 30 µL DNAase/RNAse-free water in a 96 V-well PCR plate. Spin all plates down for 00:01:00 except the bead plate. Perform a quick pulse spin down of the bead plate, just enough to get all liquid down. Centrifuge the rest of the plates at 12 000 rpm for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Create a plate map so you...
steps.instruction: Create a plate map so you know which sample you are adding to each well. Add 400 µL of your samples to 2ml deep well plate (Plate 1).

steps.title: Manually add 65 µL of Proteinase...
steps.instruction: Manually add 65 µL of Proteinase K to each well of 8 well PCR strip tubes. Using a manual multichannel pipet, aliquot 4 µL of Proteinase K into each sample (Plate 1).

steps.title: Load a set of Integra tips (tip set
steps.instruction: Load a set of Integra tips (tip set

steps.title: Program the Integra to pipet 250...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to pipet 250 µL of your samples up and down for 00:01:00 (15 cycles), then incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00 . *Keep tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 300ul. add 800 µL total of Pathogen DNA/RNA Buffer to the sample plate (Plate 1).

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix samples and buffer for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix samples and buffer for 00:02:00 . Keep tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 20ul, 20 cycles. Program the Integra to mix the MagBinding beads plate so the beads are fully resuspended. If beads are not fully to the bottom of theplate, perform a short pulse spin.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 20ul. Program the Integra to aspirate 20 µL from the MagBinding beads plate. Check that all wells have beads!

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles x 5 (10 min total), speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the beads with the sample for 00:10:00 total. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:05:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 300ul. Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into a 2ml deep well waste plate. Discard tips, load new tips.

steps.title: Remove magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove magnetic stand.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul. Dispense a total of 500 µL Wash 1 into the sample plate. Keep tips.

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the beads with the Wash buffer for 00:02:00 total. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 300ul. Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into the 2ml deep well waste plate. Keep tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul. Dispense a total of 500 µL Wash 2 into the sample plate. Keep tips.

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the beads with the wash buffer for 00:02:00 total. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 300ul. Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into the 2ml deep well waste plate. Discard tips, load new tips.

steps.title: Remove magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove magnetic stand.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul. Dispense a total of 500 µL 100% Ethanol into the sample plate.

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the beads with Ethanol for 00:02:00 t total. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 300ul. Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into the 2ml deep well waste plate.

steps.title: Remove magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove magnetic stand.

steps.title: Repeat steps 22 to 26 for...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 22 to 26 for another round of Ethanol wash. Discard tips after 2nd Ethanol wash. Load new tips.

steps.title: Keep the sample plate on the...
steps.instruction: Keep the sample plate on the magnetic stand after the final Ethanol wash until the beads are dry (~ 00:10:00 ).

steps.title: Pipet 33 µL of Nuclease-free water...
steps.instruction: Pipet 33 µL of Nuclease-free water (Heat the water at 55 °C for 00:10:00 before elution) into the dried beads and mix the beads for 00:02:00 total. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 30ul. Pipet 30 µL from the sample plate and dispense into a new 96 V-bottom PCR plate.

steps.title: Store TNA sample immediately at -80 °C
steps.instruction: Store TNA sample immediately at -80 °C .

steps.title: Aliquot SPRI beads (well mixed and...
steps.instruction: Aliquot SPRI beads (well mixed and resuspended) 50 µL into a new 96 V-bottom PCR plate.

steps.title: Prepare DNase I solution a
steps.instruction: Prepare DNase I solution a. Add 275 µL DNase/RNase-free water to reconstitute lyophilized DNase I and mix.

steps.title: Aliquot 20 µL of TNA into...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 20 µL of TNA into a new 96 V-bottom PCR plate.

steps.title: Prepare DNase master mix
steps.instruction: Prepare DNase master mix: a. 1x rxn = 20ul sample + 2.5ul DNase I + 2.5ul Digestion Buffer. b. Using a manual multichannel pipet, aliquot 5 µL of DNase I master mix to each sample and mix. c. Program: Pipet/Mix 20ul, 20 cycles, speed

steps.title: Incubate 00:15:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:15:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Add 45 µL SPRI beads (1
steps.instruction: Add 45 µL SPRI beads (1.8x ratio) to the DNase I treated sample and mix by pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate 00:05:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 100ul. Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into the 2ml deep well waste plate. Keep tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 200ul. (1st Ethanol Wash). Aspirate and dispense 200 µL of freshly made 80% Ethanol into sample plate.

steps.title: Incubate for 00:01:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:01:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 200ul. Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into the 2ml deep well waste plate. Keep tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 200ul. (2nd Ethanol Wash). Aspirate and dispense 200 µL of freshly made 80% Ethanol into sample plate.

steps.title: Incubate for 00:01:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:01:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 200ul. Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into the 2ml deep well waste plate. Discard tips, load new tips.

steps.title: Incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature until beads are dry
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature until beads are dry.

steps.title: Remove plate from magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove plate from magnetic stand.

steps.title: Add 22 µL DNase/RNase-free water to...
steps.instruction: Add 22 µL DNase/RNase-free water to each well and mix beads.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 20ul. Aspirate 20 µL of purified TNA sample to a new 96 V-bottom PCR plate.

steps.title: Store sample at -80 °C immediately
steps.instruction: Store sample at -80 °C immediately.
